name: paeruginosa_pao1_IS6100_copy1
description: Insertion sequence IS6100 copy 1 of 2 in this genome. 880 bp IS6-family element; widespread in Pseudomonas R-plasmids; flanks aminoglycoside-resistance cassettes. IS elements are mobile and create paralog signal across distant genomic loci; reads from IS6100 should be reported as multi-mapping.
